title: PCL by Avery 99.1x67.7mm 8-Up Green Permanent Labels – Chill Grade
features: ✔ Chill Grade Adhesive – Specifically designed for chilled food products, providing durability in cold storage and refrigeration.
✔ Coated Green Paper – 80gsm woodfree, coated material for sharp, high-quality print results.
✔ Strong Permanent Adhesion – Aqueous acrylic emulsion adhesive ensures a lasting bond, even in moisture-rich, cold environments.
✔ pH Neutral & Acid-Free – Safe for food-related labeling applications.
✔ Printer-Compatible – Works seamlessly with inkjet, laser, and thermal transfer printers.
description: Optimize your chilled food labeling with our 99.1x67.7mm 8-Up Green Permanent Labels, perfect for sandwiches and other refrigerated products. Made from 80gsm, woodfree, coated green paper, these labels provide vibrant prints and outstanding durability in cold environments. Featuring chill-grade adhesive, they ensure a strong, long-lasting bond even in chilled conditions. With 8 labels per sheet, these bulk-pack labels provide a cost-effective, reliable solution for businesses requiring durable, chill-grade labels. Order now for professional, high-quality food labels that perform in cold conditions!
